description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian with a slender build, wearing a fitted long-sleeve top with a checkered pattern and high-waisted, tight black pants. The figure has a distinctive hairstyle with voluminous, wavy hair swept to one side, and is accessorized with large, round glasses. The footwear consists of open-toed sandals with unique, spiked embellishments at the back. The person's hands are relaxed at their sides, and the overall posture is upright and neutral. The clothing and accessories suggest a modern, urban fashion sense suitable for city environments. The surface of the figure appears smooth and slightly matte, with realistic anatomical proportions.
description: A modern adult pedestrian with a checkered long-sleeve top, tight black pants, wavy side-swept hair, glasses, and spiked sandals, standing upright. The figure has a stylish, urban appearance with detailed accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the checkered top, glasses, wavy hair swept left, and the full frontal detail of the outfit and sandals.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the hair volume, profile of the glasses, and the spiked detail on the back of the sandals.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the checkered top, the full hairstyle, and the spiked embellishments on the sandals.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the hair's right profile, the side of the glasses, and the spiked sandal detail from another angle.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve top and high-waisted tight pants with open-toed sandals and large glasses
attribute_hairstyle: long wavy hair swept to one side
